---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
toc: false
body-classes: hero-page
---

::: {.hero}
<div class="orb orb-1"></div>
<div class="orb orb-2"></div>
::: {.hero-card}
<p class="hero-name">Jessica Benun</p>
<p class="hero-role">Business Analyst in the Making</p>

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [R]{.tag} [Machine Learning]{.tag} [SQL]{.tag} [Power BI]{.tag} [Excel]{.tag}
:::

[View my projects](projects.qmd){.btn-hero-ghost}
[Download CV](cv.qmd){.btn-hero-ghost}
:::
:::
